---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- ZKVault version / commit: [e.g. 4c171fa]

## Screenshots / Console output
If applicable, add screenshots or paste browser console errors.

## Security note
> ⚠️ If this bug relates to **cryptographic key material**, **session data**, or **plaintext credential exposure**, please use [private security reporting](../../security/advisories/new) instead of a public issue.
